[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001111 5
1 00011110 4
2 10100011 4
3 11101010 5
4 00101100 3
5 00101110 4
6 00000111 3
7 11111011 7

12 21 00101001 3
23 32 10101111 6

56 65 11100001 4
67 76 01011100 4
70 07 11000110 4

13 31 10000110 3

35 53 11111111 a

71 17 11000100 3

47 74 11001101 5

61 16 10011000 3
72 27 11101101 6
